top3.sql:
SELECT 
    c.asciiName,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN f.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM 
    cards c
JOIN 
    foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.asciiName
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    c.asciiName;

SELECT 
    c.asciiName AS name,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.multiverseid
GROUP BY c.id, c.asciiName
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY c.asciiName;

SELECT 
    c.asciiName,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN f.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM 
    cards c
JOIN 
    foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.asciiName
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    c.asciiName;

SELECT 
    c.asciiName,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN f.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM 
    cards c
INNER JOIN 
    foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.asciiName
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    c.asciiName;

SELECT 
    c.asciiName AS name,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.multiverseid
GROUP BY c.id, c.asciiName
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY c.asciiName;

SELECT 
    c.asciiName,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN f.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM 
    cards c
JOIN 
    foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.asciiName
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    c.asciiName;

SELECT 
    c.asciiName,
    ROUND(COUNT(f.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards), 2) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data f ON c.id = f.multiverseid
WHERE f.language = 'Spanish'
GROUP BY c.id, c.asciiName
ORDER BY c.asciiName;

SELECT 
    c.asciiName,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN f.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM 
    cards c
INNER JOIN 
    foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.asciiName
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    c.asciiName;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    c.asciiName,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN f.language = 'Spanish' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_spanish
FROM 
    cards c
JOIN 
    foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.asciiName
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    c.asciiName;
